mapper.select: select i.item_seq AS itemSeq, i.user_seq AS userSeq, u.user_id AS partnerId, st.company_name AS partnerName, i.category_seq AS categorySeq, i.item_code AS itemCode, i.item_name AS itemName, i.spec AS spec, i.unit_price AS unitPrice, i.item_image AS itemImage, ca.category_name AS categoryName from items i join users u on i.user_seq = u.user_seq join stores st on u.user_seq = st.user_seq left join categories ca on i.category_seq = ca.category_seq where u.user_type = 'PARTNER' order by st.company_name, i.item_seq

select s.stock_seq AS stockSeq, s.user_seq AS userSeq, s.stock AS stock, s.quantity AS quantity, s.safety_stock AS safetyStock from stocks s join users u ON s.user_seq = u.user_seq where u.user_seq = #{user_seq} and u.user_type = 'BUSINESS' and ( s.stock like concat('%', #{itemName}, '%') OR #{itemName} like concat('%', s.stock, '%') )

select st.company_name AS companyName, st.zonecode AS zoneCode, st.address1 AS address1, st.address2 AS address2 from users u join stores st ON u.user_seq = st.user_seq where u.user_seq = #{user_seq} and u.user_type = 'BUSINESS'
mapper.insert: insert into orders (order_no, zonecode, address1, address2, order_memo, buyer_seq, seller_seq, total_amount, status, created_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{zonecode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{orderMemo}, #{buyerSeq}, #{sellerSeq}, #{totalAmount},'REQUESTED', NOW())

insert into order_items (order_seq, item_seq, item_name, category_name, quantity, spec, unit_price, total_price) values (#{orderSeq}, #{itemSeq}, #{itemName}, #{categoryName}, #{quantity}, #{spec}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice})
mapper.select:
select o.order_seq as orderSeq, o.order_no as orderNo, o.seller_seq as sellerSeq, st.company_name as companyName, oi.item_name as itemName,
concat( min(oi.item_name), CASE WHEN COUNT(oi.order_item_seq) > 1 THEN CONCAT(' 외 ', COUNT(oi.order_item_seq) - 1, '건') ELSE '' END ) AS itemSummary
from orders o join users u on o.seller_seq = u.user_seq join stores st on u.user_seq = st.user_seq join order_items oi on o.order_seq = oi.order_seq
where o.buyer_seq = #{userSeq}
and ( o.order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or st.company_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or oi.item_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
group by o.order_seq, o.order_no, o.seller_seq, st.company_name
order by o.order_seq desc
